members.name: Munich Pharmacies
members.description: Pharmacy locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

members.name: Munich Offices — All
members.description: Office-related locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass, including office=* and building=office features.

members.name: Munich Law Firms
members.description: Law firm office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Consultants
members.description: Consulting office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Real Estate Offices
members.description: Real estate office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Insurance Offices
members.description: Insurance office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Government Offices
members.description: Government office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Company Offices
members.description: Company office locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Generic Office Buildings
members.description: Generic office building locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Other Offices
members.description: Other office-related locations split from the Munich Offices layer.

members.name: Munich Clinics
members.description: Clinic, doctor, and dentist locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

members.name: Munich Coworking Spaces
members.description: Coworking and startup workspace locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

members.name: Munich Restaurants
members.description: Restaurant, cafe, fast-food, bar, pub, and food-court locations in the Munich prototype bounds from OpenStreetMap via Overpass.

catalog.name: Munich Public Datasets
catalog.description: Official Munich public and open geodata references. Direct GeoJSON layers are included only when the endpoint is stable and does not require an API key.

members.name: Munich Traffic Signals (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich Open Data WFS GeoJSON layer for traffic signals (Lichtsignalanlagen). Disabled by default.

members.name: Munich Drinking Fountains (Official GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Munich Open Data WFS GeoJSON layer for municipal drinking fountains. Disabled by default.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Open Data Portal
members.description: Official Open Data Portal Munchen. Use this reference to inspect city datasets before adding a live layer: [opendata.muenchen.de](https://opendata.muenchen.de/).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich GeoPortal OpenGeodata
members.description: Official Munich GeoPortal OpenGeodata reference. Add WMS/WFS/GeoJSON layers only after confirming the exact service URL and layer name: [GeoPortal OpenGeodata](https://geoportal.muenchen.de/portal/opendata/).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Mobility Datasets
members.description: Munich mobility datasets include GTFS, counts, parking, and traffic resources. They are kept as a reference until each endpoint is selected and verified: [Munich traffic group](https://opendata.muenchen.de/group/tran).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Munich Environment, Green Zone, Charging
members.description: Environment, green-zone, and charging-station resources should be added as live layers only after the exact official no-key endpoint is verified in the Munich Open Data or GeoPortal catalogs.

catalog.name: Germany Public Datasets
catalog.description: Official Germany-wide public dataset references. Portal-style entries are documented as non-loading references to avoid broken catalog layers.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: GovData
members.description: GovData is Germany's official open government data portal. Use it to find national, state, and municipal datasets before adding a verified live layer: [govdata.de](https://www.govdata.de/).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Destatis Regional Statistics
members.description: Destatis provides official German statistics, including regional data and maps. Kept as a reference until a specific no-key map endpoint is selected: [destatis.de](https://www.destatis.de/EN/Home/_node.html).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: basemap.de / BKG
members.description: basemap.de provides official German base-map products and open-data references. Kept as a catalog reference rather than a live layer until a specific WMS/WMTS endpoint is confirmed for this prototype: [basemap.de](https://basemap.de/).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: German Boundaries and Administrative Geodata
members.description: Administrative and statistical boundary layers should be added only after confirming a stable official BKG/Destatis/GovData WMS, WFS, or GeoJSON endpoint with no API key requirement.

catalog.name: Europe Public Datasets
catalog.description: Official Europe-wide public dataset references and stable EU geodata layers that do not require an API key.

members.name: EU NUTS 2024 Level 0 Boundaries (GISCO GeoJSON)
members.description: Official Eurostat/GISCO NUTS 2024 level 0 boundaries as GeoJSON. Disabled by default.

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: European Data Portal
members.description: data.europa.eu is the official portal for European data and includes search, geospatial search, API search, and high-value dataset discovery: [data.europa.eu](https://data.europa.eu/en).

members.name: Reference / Portal Link: Eurostat GISCO
members.description: Eurostat/GISCO publishes EU geodata such as NUTS boundaries. Add additional NUTS levels only after confirming the exact GeoJSON size and intended use: [GISCO NUTS GeoJSON](https://gisco-services.ec.europa.eu/distribution/v2/nuts/geojson/).
